nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1983; const int b = 2074; const int c = 2098; const int d = 2116; const int e = 2131; const int f = 2143; const int g = 2155; const int h = 2167; const int i = 2177; const int j = 2188; const int k = 2199; const int l = 2210; const int m = 2222; const int n = 2235; const int o = 2250; const int p = 2267; const int q = 2291; const int r = 2383;
